sglang.title: [model-gateway] optimize Vec and HashMap allocations in responses api
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
grpc/utils.rs: Use Map directly instead of HashMap to avoid conversion, pre-allocate Vec for anyOf schemas with tools.len()
grpc/utils.rs: Pre-allocate combined_template_kwargs HashMap with capacity
grpc/utils.rs: Pre-allocate content_items and top_logprobs Vecs in logprobs conversion with known siz

sglang.title: [model-gateway] improve lock contention and allocation in middleware
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
TokenBucket: Convert from Arc<Mutex<TokenBucketInner>> to lock-free atomics


InFlightRequestTracker: Remove intermediate Vec allocation in compute_bucket_counts() by processing entries directly during iteration.


TokenGuardBody Drop: Replace async spawn in Drop handler with sync return_tokens_sync

sglang.title: Introduce sgl-kernel Dockerfile

Motivation

When build sgl-kernel, we have to download and build cmake, ccache, install many python packages repeatly, the cache helps but not completely.
This patch introduces a Dockerfile to build sgl-kernel, then some of the base steps can be cached and reused, this helps to speedup re-building k

`AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'sampled_token_ids'`

Th
